title: Yopay 2 Pack Jumbo Playing Cards, 20×28cm/8 X 11in Oversized Poker Deck of Cards, Big Giant Full Deck Huge Poker of Game Theme Magic Party Fun for School, Classroom, Senior, All Ages
features: Package includes 2 pack oversized playing cards, each pack card includes 52 cards with standard index, 2 jokers, totally 108 cards; They are actual playing cards just giant in size.

Portable Design: Our playing cards measures approx 20×28cm/8 X 11in, it is 8 times larger than a regular deck, neither too large nor too small, and not too large to shuffle. Convenient to carry, it is an essential choice for family and travel.
Suitable for All Ages: Friendly for people with poor eyesight, these large cards are easier to hold, you can see them without any help or guidance, while bringing them more joy in life.
Suitable for teachers or parents to teach children mathematics, which can enhance emotional communication between both parties. This is a suitable card that can create a lot of laughter and memories.
Our pocker deck are made with exquisite printing patterns and bright colors make it looks beautiful and cool. High quality, clear coated for extra durability and longevity.
